message:
test(scheduler): add streaming concurrency and determinism tests (bd-2tl1.5)

Add scheduler-level tests verifying correct behavior when multiple
concurrent streams are interleaved with non-stream macrotasks.

Tests added:
- scheduler_ten_concurrent_streams_complete_independently: enqueues 10
  streams with 5 chunks each in round-robin order, then verifies every
  stream receives exactly its expected chunks with monotonically increasing
  sequence numbers and exactly one final marker at the end
- scheduler_mixed_stream_nonstream_ordering: interleaves regular events,
  stream chunks, success outcomes, and final stream chunks, verifying the
  scheduler preserves FIFO ordering across mixed task types

These tests exercise the scheduler's stream chunk routing, per-stream
sequence tracking, and final-chunk detection under realistic concurrency
patterns using the DeterministicClock.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
